name: Adriano Espaillat
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $780,675 for Adriano Espaillat in U.S. House, NY-13. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $780,675.
